Zhijia Automobile Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., globally known as MAXIEYE, is a prominent, venture-backed autonomous driving technology company. Originally registered in Pudong New Area, Shanghai (USCC 91310115), the company relocated its headquarters to Zhenhai District, Ningbo (Zhejiang Province), likely capitalizing on local government tech incentives and proximity to major automotive manufacturing clusters. The highly precise registered and paid-in capital (~11M RMB) strongly indicates multiple rounds of equity financing. Crucially, its business scope contains a legal restriction: 'Manufacturing... limited to branch operations', meaning this Ningbo entity functions purely as an asset-light R&D center, algorithm design hub, and corporate headquarters for smart vehicle systems (ADAS/ADS), rather than operating a physical manufacturing line itself.
